title: woof quality-gates configuration
description: Project-side declaration at .woof/quality-gates.toml. Tells Stage 5 Check 1 (project quality command) what to run after each story to verify build/lint/type/test all pass. Single command per gate. Blocking gates must exit 0 within their declared timeout or Stage 5 Check 1 fails; advisory gates (blocking = false) record a minor finding on non-zero exit and continue.

gates.description: Named quality gates run in declaration order. Suggested keys: build, lint, type, test.

command.description: Shell command. Run from repo root. Blocking gates must exit 0 to pass; advisory gates (blocking = false) record a minor finding on non-zero exit and do not fail Stage 5 Check 1.

timeout_seconds.description: Hard timeout. Hitting it is treated as a check failure.

blocking.description: If false, a non-zero exit logs a finding but does not fail Stage 5 Check 1.
